description_long: This is a large, modern brick house with two stories, featuring expansive floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels. The front facade is symmetrical, with a central covered entryway supported by columns and a driveway leading to a gated garage on the left. The property is enclosed by a low, solid fence and includes a well-maintained lawn with a few mature trees. The roof is primarily flat with subtle angular sections, and the rear of the house has additional large windows and sliding glass doors opening to the backyard. The exterior is dominated by reddish-brown brickwork, complemented by gray metal fencing and white roof elements. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on natural light and open outdoor space.
description: A modern two-story brick house with large windows, a gated garage, and a fenced yard featuring trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central entryway with columns, large windows, garage, and main gate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, side lawn, and the solid brick wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more large windows and sliding doors, with a spacious backyard and fence.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the driveway, side lawn, and a tree near the fence, with a secondary entrance visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered entryway with columns, wide steps, and a modern door beneath an overhang
